extracted_information: Information on 2024 advertising policy updates for hemp and CBD products on Google, Facebook, and Instagram, including restrictions, allowed product types, compliance guidelines, and recommendations for navigating state-level regulatory inconsistencies. The content does not specifically detail policies for THCA products, but general hemp and CBD policies are covered.

features.policy_updates: Updated in 2024 to allow more flexibility for CBD and hemp product advertising.
features.prohibited_claims: Advertisements must not make health, therapeutic, or medical claims.
features.targeting_requirements: Ads must target regions where the promotion of such products is legal.
features.compliance_requirements: Advertisers may need to provide certification to verify product compliance with legal standards.

features.policy_updates: Eased restrictions on CBD and hemp product advertising in 2024.
features.targeting_requirements: Do not target users under 18. Must comply with local laws, appearing only in regions where CBD products are legal.

features.policy_updates: Updated policies allowing advertising of hemp-derived CBD products.
features.guidelines: Must follow stringent guidelines, including avoiding health claims, ensuring proper age targeting, and complying with regional regulations.

features.category: General Compliance Recommendations for Social Media (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter)
recommendations: Understand platform-specific guidelines (product types, content restrictions, age-appropriate targeting).
Ensure compliance with local and state laws; consider legal experts.
Create engaging, educational content, avoiding unverified health claims.
Implement age-gating and verification tools on websites and social media profiles.

features.description: Significant inconsistencies across US states pose compliance challenges for cannabis advertising.

examples_of_state_regulations.California: Strict rules against targeting minors, making unverified health claims; requires specific disclaimers and location restrictions.
examples_of_state_regulations.Colorado: More flexible laws, but ads must not appeal to minors and comply with local zoning laws.
examples_of_state_regulations.New York: Stringent regulations limiting where and how cannabis products can be advertised, heavily restricting visual and audio content accessible to minors.

recommendations_for_advertisers: Regularly review state regulations and updates; utilize specialized legal counsel.
Develop state-specific advertising strategies adhering to local laws and cultural norms.
Implement robust age verification processes to prevent targeting minors.
Include clear and compliant disclaimers in all advertising materials.
